#  Share Drawings Within Procore (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * An email notification with a link to view the drawing will be sent to the users. In addition, users with push notifications enabled for the Procore app will receive a notification on their Android mobile device. See [Manage Project Settings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/getting-started-procore-app-android/manage-project-settings).


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the **share** ![Icon Share 2 Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/94e63779c03441f497fd2cb0efab2497/b30002c5ec90f86de496464e35c70b16/icon-share-2-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  4. Tap **Share Within Procore**.
  5. Select one or more contacts to share the drawing with.
  6. Click **Share**.  
The drawing is automatically shared with contacts through a push notification on their device (if enabled). Contacts will also receive an email notification with a link to view the drawing.


## See Also
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
  * [Edit Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/edit-drawing-markups-android)
  * [Link Items to a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/link-items-to-a-drawing-android)
title: Share Drawings Within Procore (Android)
description: How to share drawings with other users in the Procore Android app.
